description_long: This is a military-style combat tactical vehicle with a boxy, armored body painted in matte olive green. The vehicle features four large, rugged tires suitable for off-road and urban environments, and a reinforced front bumper for added protection. The windows are small and likely bullet-resistant, with visible side mirrors and a snorkel intake on the front left side. The rear of the vehicle includes a mounted spare tire and what appears to be a fuel canister or equipment storage. The roof is flat with a circular hatch, suggesting possible access or mounting for additional equipment. The overall design emphasizes durability, protection, and utility for tactical operations.
description: A matte olive green armored combat tactical vehicle with rugged tires, reinforced bumpers, and a roof hatch, designed for durability and protection.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced bumper, grille, small armored windows, and a prominent snorkel intake on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, rugged tires, side mirrors, and the snorkel intake extending above the hood.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the mounted spare tire, rear lights, and a compact, armored back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the four doors, rugged tires, and the absence of the snorkel intake.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One circular hatch on the roof, likely intended for a weapon mount, but no visible weapons or mounts are present.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body visible armor plating with flat, thick panels covering the entire vehicle, including reinforced doors and front bumper. No sloped or modular panels are apparent.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte olive green color; no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Four large, rugged off-road tires with deep tread pattern; no visible reinforcement or chains.
